creator: portmaster@bsdforge.com
text:
(In reply to Armin Gruner from comment #2)
Thank you very much for the reply, Armin!
I know _how_ to make it work. But didn't have time
to submit any changes to the source before they
nuked it from the tree. So I simply made a
best-effort to prevent the nuke. So I could make
the necessary changes afterward(s).

Sadly, and unfairly; I wasn't given the chance. >:-{

I guess I'll have to make the changes, and submit
it as a new port, under a new name -- so much
*unnecessary* bother. :-(

Thank you again, for taking the time to reply, Armin.

If it's OK with you. I'll send you a link with
any/all changes I've done. If you're interested.

--Chris
